## Summary

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / platform support
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / code quality
- [ ] Other

## Checklist
- [ ] Tested with a real URL before submitting
- [ ] SKILL.md files stay under 500 lines
- [ ] Reference files stay under 200 lines
- [ ] Python scripts output valid JSON
- [ ] `set -euo pipefail` used in any new shell scripts
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
